rulings.Case Title: GOAL CONSTRUCTION CO., INC. VS. RJL C SAN FRANCISCO LESSEE, LP ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Defendant Rlj C San Francisco Lessee, Lp To Respond To Plaintiffs Second Demand For Production Of Documents, And To Pay The Reasonable Expenses Of The Motion
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, November 02, 2016 line 3. PLAINTIFF GOAL CONSTRUCTION CO., INC.'s Motion To Compel Defendant Rlj C San Francisco Lessee, Lp To Respond To Plaintiffs Second Demand For Production Of Documents, And To Pay The Reasonable Expenses Of The Motion GRANTED, no opposition filed. Complete responses without objections must be provided within 10 days of notice of entry of order. Sanctions granted in the amount of $1,370.90. Moving party prepare order. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: ANNE N. LEE VS. HAI PING LI ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, November 02, 2016 line 7. DEFENDANT HAI LI, ANNIE HE, KEVIN HE's DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT OVERRULED, 5 days to answer. Complaint and Notice sufficiently allege facts to support a cause of action for unlawful detainer. Additionally, the Court notes that the moving party failed to comply with CRC 3.1110(a) and 3.1112(d).= (501/REQ)
